metadata.description: Developer productivity plugins and skills for AI coding agents

plugins.name: bookmark
plugins.description: Session context continuity — auto-save and restore context across compactions and terminal closures

plugins.name: claude-code-debugger
plugins.description: Debugging memory — learn from past bugs with verdict-based retrieval and pattern extraction

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Central, token-efficient research knowledge base — SQLite FTS5, source tier scoring, claim verification, lifecycle management. Persists to ~/research/ with project symlinks.

plugins.name: ibr
plugins.description: UI validation — verify implementations match intent with live page scanning and visual regression

plugins.name: navgator
plugins.description: Architecture tracking — map dependencies, analyze impact, and visualize your stack

plugins.name: showcase
plugins.description: [DEPRECATED — use spectra] Dev asset capture — screenshots and video clips during development for blog/website content. The spectra plugin's spectra_library tool covers all functionality plus a non-destructive migration from .showcase/.

plugins.name: build-loop
plugins.description: Orchestrated 5-phase development loop (Assess → Plan → Execute → Review → Iterate) plus optional Learn. Review combines critic, validate, optimize, fact-check, simplify, and report. Includes NavGator / claude-code-debugger / logging-tracer bridges with standalone fallbacks. Opus 4.7 orchestrator. 0.3.2 adds a deterministic Review-F writer (state.json.runs[] is now actually populated) + plugin cache-sync gate in Review-D.

plugins.name: agent-builder
plugins.description: Design and evaluate agentic harnesses — methodology playbooks plus an empirical catalog of architectures, frameworks, memory substrates, and production lab patterns

plugins.name: pyramid-principle
plugins.description: Barbara Minto's Pyramid Principle as composable writing skills — short-form, long-form, presentations, and audit

plugins.name: prompt-builder
plugins.description: Prompt Policy Engine — classify, diagnose, rewrite, and score prompts by model tier and deployment. Callable by agents, tools, and slash commands.

plugins.name: replit-migrate
plugins.description: Migrate Replit apps to web (Vercel) or native (iOS/macOS) with encoded lessons from real migrations

plugins.name: web-scraper
plugins.description: Intelligent web scraper for extracting blog/news content from any website

plugins.name: stratagem
plugins.description: Market research agent with document processing, web scraping, SEC filings, and financial analysis

plugins.name: mockup-gallery
plugins.description: Visual mockup review gallery with component-level ratings, auto-save to file, and Claude Code integration

plugins.name: spectra
plugins.description: Content capture and library for marketing — screenshots, videos, and usage sequences across web, macOS, iOS, watchOS, plus a tagged library for organizing and exporting assets. Supersedes the deprecated showcase plugin (one-command migration via spectra_library action="migrate-from-showcase").

plugins.name: agent-astronomer
plugins.description: Query your local Claude Code skill, agent, and plugin library from any conversation. Wraps the Agent Astronomer CLI (bin/aa) as MCP tools.

plugins.name: api-registry
plugins.description: Local registry of authoritative API/library/tool source URLs. Prevents stale-training-data drift when configuring or debugging external services.
